It facilitates transparent, human-in-the-loop creation with reusable Style Skills for consistent, professional storytelling.

beginnerProjects.name: RD-Agent
beginnerProjects.description: Research and development (R&D) is crucial for the enhancement of industrial productivity, especially in the AI era, where the core aspects of R&D are mainly focused on data and models.
